---
title: "eda_cb"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(SingleCellMultiModal)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(scran)
library(scater)
library(mclust)
library(bluster)
library(EnsDb.Hsapiens.v75)
```

```{r}
sce_cb <- readRDS("~/datasets/cord_blood/cord_blood_sce.RDS")
```

#### 1. find mithocondial genes  ####
```{r}
chr.loc <- mapIds(EnsDb.Hsapiens.v75, keys=rownames(sce_cb),
                  keytype="SYMBOL", column="SEQNAME")

is.mito <- which(chr.loc == c("MT"))
table(is.mito)
```

```{r}
df <- perCellQCMetrics(sce_cb, subsets=list(Mito=is.mito))

# include them in the object
colData(sce_cb) <- cbind(colData(sce_cb), df)
colData(sce_cb)

table(df$sum < 10000)

table(df$subsets_Mito_percent > 5)

summary(df$detected)

summary(df$subsets_Mito_percent)
```


```{r}
reasons <- perCellQCFilters(df, sub.fields=c("subsets_Mito_percent", "altexps_scADT_percent"))
colSums(as.matrix(reasons))
summary(reasons$discard)
sce_cb$discard <- reasons$discard
```

Train and test creation
```{r}
set.seed(42)
n_samples <- ncol(sce_cb)
indices <- sample(c("TRUE", "FALSE"), n_samples, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.7, 0.3))
#table(indices)
sce_cb$is_train <- indices 
table(sce_cb$is_train)
```

Add a column in rowdata with gene_names

```{r}
rowData(sce_cb)$gene_names <- rownames(sce_cb)
rowData(sce_cb)$gene_names
```



```{r}
saveRDS(sce_cb, file = "~/datasets/cord_blood/cb_sce.RDS")
#sce_cb <- readRDS("~/datasets/cord_blood/cb_sce.RDS")

sce_cb[,sce_cb$is_train=="TRUE"] |>
  saveRDS("~/datasets/cord_blood/train_sce_cb.RDS")
sce_cb[,sce_cb$is_train=="FALSE"] |>
  saveRDS("~/datasets/cord_blood/test_sce_cb.RDS")
```

# Diagnostic plots

```{r}
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "sum", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Total count")
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "sum", x = "celltype", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Total count per sample")
```

```{r}
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "detected", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Detected features")
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "detected", x = "celltype", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Detected features per sample")
```

```{r}
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "subsets_Mito_percent", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Mito percent")
plotColData(sce_cb, y = "subsets_Mito_percent", x = "celltype", colour_by = "discard") + ggtitle("Mito percent per sample")
```

```{r}
plotColData(sce_cb, x="sum", y="subsets_Mito_percent", colour_by="discard")
plotColData(sce_cb, x="detected", y="subsets_Mito_percent", colour_by="discard")
```
